item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: We need a system that respects personal freedom while also ensuring social stability and fairness for all.

notes: Agent A opens strongly against society-over-individual with an autonomy and minority-protection frame, then shifts toward balance and community-solidarity concerns. Agent B stays more rights-first but acknowledges public welfare, systemic inequality, and shared responsibility. Both agents engage specific claims. Agent A turn 5 contains Chinese text despite the English-language assignment.
